---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: article
margin-header: subscribe.html

listing: 
  contents: posts # this name must match the name of the folder with posts
  type: grid # or `default` or `table`; each type has its own set of yaml options
  sort: "date desc" # can also sort on more than one field
  categories: true # allows you to sort posts by assigned categories 
  feed: true
---
